title: 3Powers per-project gate tool overrides (gates.yaml)
description: Per-gate TOOL overrides shared by the team. Keys match the adapter manifest's gate names; only the keys you set override the adapter. Overrides replace the tool a gate runs, never which gates run (the risk tier alone decides that).

additionalProperties.description: One gate's tool override. Recognized keys vary by gate; unset keys keep the adapter value.

fix_cmd.description: Fix command; honored for format/lint and only under --auto-fix.

cmd.description: The command a gate runs (e.g. types, tests).

coverage_format.description: Coverage report format the tests gate emits (e.g. lcov).

coverage_path.description: Path to the coverage report, relative to the scanned target.
